ideation: This sequence depicts a man putting on or adjusting a veil, a gesture associated with weddings and formal events. The animation will focus on the hands gently lifting and placing the veil, emphasizing the delicate and careful movements involved.  The sequence will begin with the arms at rest, then transition to the hands lifting the veil, followed by a placement phase, and finally, returning to a resting position. The left arm will remain relatively still to contrast the right arm's more active role. The overall movement is meant to be slow and deliberate, reflecting the solemnity of the occasion.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, a moment of calm
right hand gently lifts, preparing to adjust the veil
the veil is carefully placed, a delicate touch
arms return to rest, the gesture complete
